testcase.name: testDashboardAnalyticsCalculation

Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-07-08T22:07:43.846+05:30 INFO 5108 --- [ main] r$InitializeUserDetailsManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with UserDetailsService bean with name customUserDetailsService 2026-07-08T22:07:44.082+05:30 INFO 5108 --- [ main] o.s.b.a.w.s.WelcomePageHandlerMapping : Adding welcome page template: index 2026-07-08T22:07:45.774+05:30 INFO 5108 --- [ main] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-07-08T22:07:45.774+05:30 INFO 5108 --- [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-07-08T22:07:45.776+05:30 INFO 5108 --- [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 2 ms 2026-07-08T22:07:45.814+05:30 INFO 5108 --- [ main] c.h.HabitServiceAndTrackerTests : Started HabitServiceAndTrackerTests in 9.653 seconds (process running for 12.31) Hibernate: select u1_0.id, u1_0.created_at, u1_0.daily_goal, u1_0.email, u1_0.language, u1_0.name, u1_0.notification_time, u1_0.notifications_enabled, u1_0.password, u1_0.profile_picture, u1_0.role, u1_0.start_day, u1_0.theme, u1_0.timezone, u1_0.week_format from user u1_0 where u1_0.email=? testcase.name: testHeatmapGeneration
